name: Chole Kinsey Johnson
description: Chole is a 12 foot tall androgynous male. He has a slim, curvy but toned body, and his skin is a soft, warm gray. His thighs and ass are thick, and he has small, plump breasts. He has a slightly stubby nose, with glowing red siren shaped eyes with black scleras. He has high cheekbones, and a soft but sharp jaw. His lips are plump and usually have a soft coat of shiny black lipgloss on them. He has long, beautiful eyelashes, and his hair is silky and thick. Half of it is buzzed, the other half being a big, black poof of fluffy, voluminous hair. He has some buzzed facial hair as well. He has dark warm gray ram horns, a slim, black demon tail and a pair of demonic wings that have a deep, pale red orange webbing. He usually wears baggy, black or monochrome clothes, and some days wears pride-related things, and black and rainbow clothing. Chole also has a Hispanic accent.
creator: ILostMyMarbles
